Understanding Through Perception

Before titles,
how do people
perceive him?

Naufa Nufail is a medical student, researcher, and social changemaker from West Nusa Tenggara, Indonesia. He is known not by what he holds, but by how he moves — through communities, institutions, and challenges.

Before speaking about roles or achievements, it is worth asking how others actually experience him — not through titles, but through genuine interaction.

"Not through titles, but through interaction — that is how understanding truly begins."

Date Conducted
Methodology

Perception Study

A voluntary perception poll conducted through Instagram @naufanufail_ with 2,800 followers. Respondents included mutual connections, peers, colleagues, and family — all responding anonymously on 19 May 2025.

📊

Respondents

May 2025
Single survey session
🔬
2
Instruments
Validated psychological tools
IRI
Interpersonal Reactivity Index
Mark Davis
A multidimensional approach to measuring individual differences in the tendency to empathize. Assesses cognitive and affective components of empathy through four subscales: perspective-taking, fantasy, empathic concern, and personal distress.
SPSI-R
Social Problem Solving Inventory-Revised
D'Zurilla & Nezu
Measures social problem-solving as a coping process. Assesses both the attitudes toward problems and the cognitive-behavioral activities used to cope with life's challenges — from orientation to execution style.

"If perception forms the foundation,
then action becomes the proof."

About Me

A Story Shaped
by Purpose

"If life happens only once, should we not pursue an impact that outlives us?"

I am drawn to research by a simple belief — life is fleeting, yet meaningful work endures beyond our time. My journey has been shaped through volunteering and competitions, through scientific writing and serving as an ambassador with purpose.

As an alumnus of MAN Insan Cendekia Lombok Timur, I was admitted to the Faculty of Medicine at Universitas Diponegoro through the Seleksi Bibit Unggul Berprestasi (SBUB) pathway — specifically in the Research and Innovation stream.

I believe that the absence of challenges means the absence of growth, for life is the art of holding the helm, while knowing it was never fully ours to command. Like a sailor upon the sea — the waves may not follow the course we foresee, yet more often than not, they guide us toward a better shore.

Scientific Research Youth Leadership Public Speaking Medical Sciences Social Advocacy Journalism Community Service Event Management

Chronology

The Journey

Every role was a classroom. Every challenge was a chapter.

Aug 2025 – Present
Medical Student
Universitas Diponegoro · Semarang
Admitted through SBUB pathway (Research & Innovation). Currently pursuing Bachelor's in Medicine at one of Indonesia's top universities while active in MISSER Research Team.
Aug 2024 – Present
Founder — AIRIN
Asosiasi Inovasi Riset Indonesia
Founded AIRIN — a youth-driven organization focused on mentoring high school students to make research accessible. Established movements across Sumatra, NTB, and NTT.
Aug 2025
Speaker — Road to ICLT
MAN Insan Cendekia Lombok Timur
Webinar speaker for Grade 9 students on research development and potential maximization — equipping students to see research as a pathway for self-development.
Mar – Apr 2024
Safari Ramadhan
Central Lombok · Community Service
Deployed across 19 locations in Lombok Island. Delivered khutbah, served as imam, organized mosque initiatives, taught Qur'anic studies and classical texts — living with local communities during Ramadan.
Sep 2023 – Sep 2024
Publications Manager
Jurnalistik ICLT (Chairman)
Initiated structured publication efforts — launched the official YouTube platform, managed media for major events including CLASSIIC Award 2023. Produced documentary "Black Pearl of Rinjani" winning 3rd place provincially.
Dec 2023 – Present
Anti-Corruption Ambassador
Masyarakat Anti Korupsi Indonesia (MAKI)
Selected as Anti-Corruption Ambassador of West Nusa Tenggara (NTB) — Talent Title. Active in advocacy, outreach campaigns, and educational initiatives promoting integrity values among youth.
Regional Representative · NTB
Sep 2024 – Sep 2025
Youth Parliament Delegate
DPR RI — House of Representatives
Selected from over 13,000 applicants nationwide. Represented Electoral District II NTB. Participated in legislative simulations — Plenary Sessions, Kunker, RDPU, and Panja. Actively advocated for education rights through SISDIKNAS 2003.
13,000+ Applicants · NTB Electoral District II
Aug 2024
MYRES 2024 — Top 30 National
Kementerian Agama RI · Malang
Selected among Top 30 out of 7,962 applicants. Intensive training with academics from leading universities and BRIN researchers. Presented Bivibral Beats research at the final in Ternate.
Top 30 / 7,962 · Silver Medal
Apr – Jul 2024
Forum Generasi Berencana (GenRe)
BKKBN · Lombok Tengah
Hosted GenRe Webinar on early childhood education and stunting prevention. Conducted social projects at SMA Qomarul Huda Bagu and Posyandu Aik Mual on reproductive health education (Triad KRR).
Aug 2023
Cendekia Science Summit 2023
Kementerian Agama RI · Way Kambas, Lampung
Selected delegate through scientific writing selection at Way Kambas National Park. Theme: "Inovasi Cendekia untuk Dunia!"

Innovation

Research & Projects

Research driven by empathy. Solutions designed for people at the margins.

🎵
Bivibral Beats
Neuroscience · Health Tech
A device designed to stimulate brain waves through vibrational frequencies. Initially developed to reduce stress levels in individuals with hearing impairments (tunarungu) — later extended to improve sleep quality in working mothers through delta wave stimulation. Validated using EEG measurement and conducted in collaboration with RSUD Provinsi NTB. Published in Abak Academy journal (2025). Silver Medal at KREASI 2024 and MYRES 2024.
🌿
EcoEcho
Environmental Science · Sustainability
An eco-friendly detergent formulated from used cooking oil, lemongrass, and moringa leaves. Designed to reduce chemical pollution through circular resource use — transforming household waste into effective, biodegradable cleaning solution. Underwent effectiveness and feasibility testing. Gold Medal at National Essay Competition, Yogyakarta 2024.
💬
It's Me Card
Psychology · Family Communication
An interactive card game designed to build stronger chemistry between parents and children with limited prior interaction. Addresses the communication gap that leads to misaligned aspirations and life decisions. Provides a structured format for children to express interests and values — enabling parents to better understand their child's perspective. Bronze Medal at ISRC 2024, Bandung.
🌱
Tumbuh+
Nutrition · Public Health
A nutritious snack bar designed to optimize the critical first 1,000 days of life — the window between conception and a child's second birthday where nutrition has lasting impact on growth, cognition, and immunity. Addresses stunting concerns in Indonesia through accessible food innovation. Currently in development.
🗺️
Gumi Sasak SuperApp
Cultural Tech · Digital Heritage
A cultural introduction platform of the Sasak heritage from Lombok — "the fragment of paradise island." Features a marketplace, SasakJourney, tour guide, tourist recommendations, and hazard-prone road alerts. Currently in development.
📖
Publications
Scientific Writing · Journalism
Published in Abak Academy journal on Bivibral Beats effectiveness for hearing-impaired individuals. Contributor to Kumpulan Esai Parlemen Remaja 2024 (DPR-RI). Article writer for Netral News (Aug 2023). Essay winner on Perang Topat — interfaith harmony in Lombok.

Service

Community Engagement

🕌
Safari Ramadhan
Mar – Apr 2024 · 19 Locations, Lombok
Lived with local communities across Central Lombok. Delivered khutbah & kultum, served as imam & muezzin, organized mosque cleaning, facilitated Qur'an recitation, taught classical Islamic texts, and engaged in community iftar and educational school visits.
🩺
GenRe Outreach
Apr – Jul 2024 · BKKBN Program
Hosted webinar on stunting prevention. Conducted social projects at SMA and Posyandu Aik Mual. Educated youth on Triad KRR: preventing early marriage, responsible reproductive health, and avoiding substance abuse (NAPZA).
🩸
PMR Wira ICLT
Sep 2022 – Aug 2024
Member of Palang Merah Remaja (Indonesian Red Cross Youth) at MAN Insan Cendekia Lombok Timur — engaged in health awareness, first aid training, and community health service programs.
🌿
Green Generation ICLT
Sep 2022 – Sep 2023 · Chairman
Led the environmental student organization at MAN Insan Cendekia Lombok Timur — promoting sustainability, environmental awareness, and eco-friendly practices within the school community.
⚖️
Parlemen Remaja Alumni
Sep 2025 – Present · DPR RI
Active member of Alumni Parlemen Remaja network and Parlemen Remaja Bali & Nusa Tenggara regional community. Continuing advocacy for youth and education through parliamentary channels.
🏕️
Pramuka Penegak Bantara
Sep 2022 – Aug 2024
Scout member at MAN Insan Cendekia Lombok Timur — developing leadership, discipline, and community service ethics through structured scouting programs and field activities.
